name: Blackbaud Development Agent
description: Autonomous AI agent embedded in Raiser's Edge NXT for proactive donor relationship management and fundraising cultivation. Identifies, cultivates, and engages donors with personalized, brand-aligned outreach at scale.
capabilities: Manage mid-tier donor relationships at scale
pricing: Included in Raiser's Edge NXT subscription
notes: General availability launched March 17, 2026 for Raiser's Edge NXT US customers. International expansion and integration with other Blackbaud products planned for later 2026. Designed for human oversight with configurable brand voice and engagement types.
